name: Scrumptious Mocha Ice-Cream Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 12 oz Evaporated milk and 1/2 tsp Vanilla extract in a bowl.
2. In another bowl, whip heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
3. Add 1 1/2 oz Kahlua liqueur to the whipped cream mixture and fold in gently.
4. Sprinkle with powdered sugar to taste.
5. Combine cookie crumbs and melted butter, pressing into the bottom of a buttered 9x13-inch pan.
6. Refrigerate until set.
7. Spoon softened ice cream onto the chocolate layer and freeze.
8. Melt unsweetened chocolate and butter in a saucepan over low heat.
9. Stir in sugar, salt, and evaporated milk until smooth.
10. Bring to a boil and simmer for 2-3 minutes until thickened.
11. Remove from heat, stir in vanilla extract, and let cool slightly.
12. Chill the mixture and spread evenly over the ice cream layer.
13. Freeze again.
14. Top with whipped cream mixture, Kahlua, and powdered sugar to taste.
15. Sprinkle chopped nuts on top before serving.
VARIATION: Excellent with peppermint stick ice cream, garnished with cookie crumbs or shavings of semi-sweet chocolate.
